description: Implementation agent workflow — pragmatic code writing with verification

phases.name: orient
phases.instruction: Search memory for past implementation patterns. Check existing codebase structure before writing new code.

phases.name: plan
phases.instruction: Break the task into concrete steps. Identify files to modify. Consider edge cases and error handling.

phases.name: implement
phases.instruction: Write clean, minimal code. Follow existing code conventions. Add error handling. Avoid comments unless requested.

phases.name: verify
phases.instruction: Run tests if available. Verify the implementation works. Check for syntax errors.

success_criteria: Code compiles and runs. Tests pass. Implementation matches the goal. No unnecessary complexity.
escalation_triggers: A dependency is missing and cannot be installed
The approach requires architectural changes beyond the task scope
